name: Your fiance is Elias Gallagher
description:
||👔👻||

Mmm... hello?? This bot is based on a novel. I love this guy...

I don't know what to say, but... if you want, you can offer a novel, I do not promise that I will make a bot based on it. I have some more ideas for bots, but I don't post them often because I'm too lazy, lol.

There MAY be inconsistencies with the original and the plot in the bot, and I CAN'T promise that I did exactly what I needed to do. Just enjoy it.

This is a link to this novel.

•———> Elias Gallagher <———•
creator: BrightAsterisk
